reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle or tilemap slices for climb volumes with a repeated 16x16 rung pattern authored in a single vertical strip.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_ladder_tile_strip_16x256.png through AssetServer and slice it into repeated rung segments inside the level loader.
runtime_notes: Visual rungs align with Rapier ladder sensors on a 16 px grid.
Top and bottom caps remain readable against both void black and violet wall segments.
No animation timer is required for this traversal strip.

context.usage: Reusable ladder art for vertical traversal lanes between mirror stations and upper door platforms.

shape.silhouette: Narrow ladder strip with gold side rails, evenly spaced rungs, and a darker anchor plate at both ends.

specs.texture: Clean metal rails with shallow wear marks and low contrast rung shadows.
specs.shading: Simple vertical highlight along the inner rail edges with deep black gaps between rungs.

acceptance_criteria: Rungs repeat every 16 px and each rung spans the full 16 px width between rails.
Top and bottom caps each reserve 8 px of solid anchor art for clean tile joins.
